jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Ninjacart
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
